description: You are a patent agent at an IP law firm. You have received a raw text dump of a patent application from an inventor. The draft must be formatted per USPTO standards before electronic filing. The unformatted document is open in Calligra Words at /home/ga/Documents/patent_application.odt. A formatting specification document summarizing USPTO requirements (37 CFR 1.52) has been placed at /home/ga/Desktop/uspto_formatting_requirements.txt. Apply all formatting rules from the specification document to the patent application, paying special attention to the hierarchical formatting of the claims section. Save the document at /home/ga/Documents/patent_application.odt when complete.
